response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior individual contributor with broad full-stack experience, but the role requires an executive CTO with 5+ years senior technical leadership, proven track record scaling engineering orgs from 10 to 30+, production multi-agent AI systems at scale, and deep fintech-infrastructure expertise. Resume shows no people-management or executive leadership experience, only nascent exposure to agentic AI (MCP tooling at re:cinq for ~6 months), and limited fintech depth (RIDE Capital for ~15 months as an IC). The gap between the role's executive scope and the candidate's IC trajectory is too wide.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across backend, distributed systems, and high-throughput services (Sociomantic)
Recent hands-on exposure to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship discipline — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tools authorship
concerns: No demonstrated people-management, executive leadership, or experience scaling teams to 30+
No production multi-agent AI systems in regulated/high-stakes commercial environments
Fintech exposure is limited to one ~15-month IC role; no credit-risk, liquidity, or compliance architecture experience

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering craftsmanship and polyglot depth
